"**There are intruders on the lower level, suspected to be making there way here.**" Lexi also looks back at the AT-ST. "**We've been ordered not to loiter, perhaps we could discuss this inside?**"
**"Sorry, but I'm a bit busy, as I said, if you want to speak with me you'll have to make an appointment with my Droid Secretary. Pardon me, I have somewhere to be."**
She moves between Veq and Lexi, setting off at a fast pace towards the Southern, as yet unexplored part of this level.
**"Have a nice day."**

Lexi hesitates for only a moment as her plan to coax the woman back into her lab fails, and it's enough for the doctor to move past both her and Veq to head towards the area of the base still unknown. Letting her go, she starts heading back the way they had come, not wanting to be caught by the security forces in the corridor once more and stops just outside the west door of their last option in room 7.
Entering Room 7, Lexi sees a pair of researchers talking as they stare at a duo of bacta tanks, mysterious deformed entities floating within. The two scientists turn to stare at Lexi as she enters.
One of the floating entities is larger than the other, but they're otherwise non-descript.
One of the scientists, a female, seems to speak up first: **"Who are you? How did you get access to this laboratory?"**
**"These two must be Reapers... Probably stole a keycard from Stormtrooper Commander."**
**"Hello, Doctors, sorry to intrude on your work..."**

Lexi follows Veq's lead and gives an apologetic smile.  She steps out of the way of Veq and NZ, letting the door close behind them. Last thing they needed was to draw attention from the hallway. "**We've come as a favor of one of your fellows.**"

**"Of course..."** She nods, **"Now this intrusion begins to make sense... one of our fellow reserachers must have hired these to take us out. How foolish of you, perhaps whomever hired you forgot to tell you just how fruitless this fight shall be..."** She nods to her colleage.
Purple saber ignites.
Red saber powers on.
**"Who was it that hired you? You might as well tell us, while you yet live..."**
**"Sorry, professional courtesy and all that..."**
Lexi's expression changes to a thin line as the ruse, which wasn't much of one at all, was up. As blades ignite she quickly brings hers to hand, ready for the confrontation.
**"Let's get this over with."** He slaps an injector into his neck, veins throbbing with anger.
**"The pretty one is mine, you take the ugly crab-head thing."**
She plunges an injector into her arm, with a hiss, it pumps something into her body and the scientist's aura in the Force raises several times correspondingly.
**"Statement: Master, I think these two are cheating..."**

The pretty Doctor spreads open her talon-like fingers and slashes them in the air, as Lexi charges her head on with yellow and green sabers leading the way. The slashes seem to hang in the air, intercepting the lightsabers as Xass laughs insanely. Xass attempts to conjure another telekinetic claw, closing it tightly around Lexi, but the Jedi shatters the construct with a keen Force pulse.
The bulky Scientist swipes his saber, swatting away NZ's energy staff. Meanwhile, Veq's Force Power seems to rebound off the tough brute without any effect.
NZ jumps away backwards summersaulting, and fires a concealed wrist blaster that charrs the bulky researcher's white lab coat.
Doctor Xiss stomps forward, swiping his saber at Veq who takes a gruesome cut across his torso, his Force abilities once again unable to penetrate the brutish scientist's Force Defense.
NZ examines his own damage, finding his servos have been burned in the melee exchange, melted somehow.
**"Caution: Masters, this one seems to exude pyrokinetic energy."**
Doctor Xass licks her lips, revealing a forked tongue, upon seeing a line of blood appear on Lexi. **"Yessss... More genetic samplessss..."**

Lexi Force Pushes Xass into her colleage, the female's hair partly going up in flames as a result, but she recovers quickly, getting back on her feet and makes a grasping gesture trying to clasp Lexi once more -- only to be rebuffed with a strong will from the Jedi once more.

The alien attempts to jump back, as he doesn't want to be near both of the Reapers now, using telekinesis to hurl a chair at Xish, although it breaks pathetically against the massive humanoid, pieces catching alight. There is a break in the action, as both parties regroup on opposite sites of the Laboratory, wiping blood from their mouths and catching their breaths.

Lexi risks glancing over at Veq and NZ as they fall back from the two researchers. "**Alright?**" she asks in low tones, seeing the two with burns from their opponent. Her attention quickly goes back to the pair, watching their movements in the event they do something else to provide themselves an advantage.
The alien is breathing hard, his oddly monstrous voice seems strained and wheezes can be heard, **"We need... some kind of plan..."**
**"Master, I'm unable to take blows from the male without melting my circuits."**
The Droid seems glitchy, having sustained some damage for the first time, his limbs are sparking with electricity.
**"Look what you did to my hair you brute!!"**
**"Hey, I'm sorry, but how was I supposed to know you'd show up - you said you wanted the pretty one remember?"**
**"MY HAIR!~!"**
She smacks the other researcher across the face.
**"What if we just leave...?"**
Unfortunately, the door seems to be on the other side, near the two scientists.
In hushed tone, he continues: **"Feign an attack, then run out?"**
Lexi watches the exchange between the two. "**Could you amplify the woman's animosity more towards her partner?**"
He nods, **"Right now? If I try this, get ready to resume the fight if it fails..."**
"**Before that... do you have any of the bacta injectors?**" she asks him, ready to give him one of the ones she brought from the medbay.
**"Yeah, I almost forgot.."** He takes out his own, applying one.
Lexi reaches into her own supply and quickly applies one of the injectors. "**NZ, do what you can from a distance. Focus on taking out the woman first.**"
Her wounds seem to heal up fully as she continues to slap her co-researcher.
**"Aknowledge, Master. I shall attempt to use my sneak attack next..."** He goes translucent as his holoshroud activates.
Lexi nods to Veq. "**Now... see what you can do to get them to attack each other...**"

The air around the crab-skull pulses, as Veq splays out his fingers and then brings them together into a concentration hand-sign. The pulse of Empathic Amplification hits both Reapers, and although Xish seems to reject the suggestion, Xass gladly abliges the mental compulsion.

Taking out her long, reptilian claws she slashes Xish's face back and forth, back and forth, all the while her own face is contorted with uncontrollable rage. Xish uses his forearm to ward most of the swipes, a good number still get through nonetheless.

Xish directs his finger at the alien, Veq. Yelling in a rage, he shouts out, **"Xass stop this! You're being manipulated!"** Then the tip of his finger discharges a glowing fireball of pure red flame. The projectile detonates at Veq's and Lexi's feet. Although it creates a bright flash that quickly dissipates without doing any actual damage, it does char both of the protagonists and more importantly - causes Veq'neviz to lose concentration and focus on maintaining the Empathic Amplification.
Xass shakes off the spell, eyes turning on the opposing duo radiating new found levels of hatred.

The female Reaper suddenly gets blasted with another Force Push powered up by the Jedi. Lexi winds up her arm and telekinetically SLAMS Xass against the back wall of glass beakers, which all shatter. However, some of the glass shard induced wounds immediately begin to heal. Xass stands up, glass shards embedded in her skin and slowly being pushed out as her enhanced Healing Factor begins its work.

Xish snarls and whips up his arm, sending a wave of heat in the opposing direction, dealing some slight thermal damage to Veq and Lexi, as they see a wave of heat haze envelop them and cause them both to break out in a sweat, making their lightsabers slightly more slippery in their grips.

Xass dives into a run, loping forward on all fours, long lizard tail whipping behind her. She leaps and slashes at Lexi mid stride - wicked claw leading the way as she executes a feral Charging Claw Swipe. Lexi blocks expertly, using the Force in conjunction with her saber technique, Xass' violet blade able to bat against Lexi's verdant lightsaber. Just then, a blaster shot lands squarely in Xass' flank, as N-Zee rematerializes momentarily to puncture Xass using his wrist blaster. Xass slides across the floor with her claws and turns around, snarling. Xass immediately executes another run with her second Charging Claw Swipe. This time, instead of just blocking, Lexi centers herself, and having seen this attack once before, makes a few mental calculations. As Xass bounds up to the Jedi, Lexi swipes across the scientist's flank drawing a long gash as the feral creatures passes by. Veq'neviz telekinetically flings a tray of scalpels at Xass: numerous projectiles land into her soft flesh, as Veq skewers her against the chalkboard - Dead, pinned like a bug specimen.

As Xass was skewered against the chalkboard with a series of sharp laboratory implements, knives and scalpels, Xish erupts in a roar. The heavy musclebound scientist charges, completely enraged. He's now literally on fire as he does so. His berserk, Furious Charge slams into Lexi and Veq - knocking both over like bowling pins. Then, Xish impacts against the far wall of the laboratory, Lexi and Veq having been shoved aside like a couple of unfortunate Nature's Fury survivors. The trample damage is so massive both heads are ringing at this point. N-Zee sneaks away in the meantime, under his holoshroud, and pickpockets Xass' White Keycard from the dead scientist. Lexi uses the Force throw Xish into the bacta tank with the goal of perhaps dousing his flame a bit. He seems to recover from it as if walking through a mesh doorway, looking pissed - and still alight. Veq tries to throw a microscope at the reaper - it clangs against the reaper's bald head, leaving a dent. Xish charges once more like an enraged bull, this time Veq rolls out of the way nimbly. However, Lexi is not so fortunate - taking the second massive impact square on - though thanks to her light weight she is swatted away and goes pinwheeling, instead of being slammed into the back wall. Instead, Xish charge is halted when he impacts a large supercomputer there. Rebounding, he looks more enraged than ever: "**That cost half a million credits."** Charging once more and for the last time, Lexi has finally figured out his pattern. Executing a perfect dodge at the very last second, she swings out her leg and trips Xish by the ankle. This narrowly avoids him bowling down Veq, which would surely have killed him. Xish slams against the far wall, and lays still, unconscious, eyes rolled back into his head.
Veq does stand up, but he's been burned right down the middle like a tire just ran over him and half his crab-helm is charred black.
**"Well, it wasn't the cleanest victory... but any fight you walk away from is a win in my book. Not bad... Chosen One."**

Lexi gives her companion a tired smile as she looks him over. "**Let's wrap up here and head back to the medbay. At least we have what we came for.**" Striding towards the slumped form of Vish, she looks down at him with a frown. Unable to move him, even with the Force to get at his key card her thoughts turn to the implications now that the fight is over. A pit forms in her belly as the realization of what she is considering comes to the fore.
Looking around she looks for anything they could use first to confine the Reaper Scientist and prevent him from raising an alarm once he wakes. "**NZ, does she have anything else on her?**"
***"380 Imperial Credits, Master. Nothing else of note."**

"**Thanks, NZ**" Lexi says taking the credits. Not finding anything to restrain the unconcious scientist she glances over at Veq. "**If we leave him... do you think it will be likely he'll raise an alarm when he wakes?**" Continuing to look around, she looks through the array of drugs the pair had on hand. Perhaps something to knock out the Reaper for awhile yet.
**That's Thorazine, a whole bottle of it should keep him nice and relaxed for the next 24 hours and more, I should think."**
"**Perfect... we should be gone long before then,**" Lexi says, grabbing the bottle and an injector.
While she may not have been familiar with the strange medicines laying around, she does know how to administer medicines and manages to inject the thorazine into the unconscious Reaper.
The slumbering Reaper is dosed nicely, and his heartbeat slows noticeably.
Satisfied the Reaper has been adequetley dealt with she starts for the door. "**NZ, can you lock the door so no one can get in?**"
**"Get your filthy claws away from him you wretched bitch!"** It seems the female Reaper has come to, although she is still pinned, her regeneration has awoken her.
**"Uh... better get the Thorazine out again."**
**"I can do so, yes, Master."** N-Zee ignites a fusion torch from one of his fingers and begins to cut away the door panel.
Lexi grabs another bottle, but wonders how effective it's going to be with her regenerative ability.
**"I swear I will pluck your eyeballs out with my nails like ice cream scoops and shove them up directly up your-- YEOUCH!-- You dare prick me~"**
Her words go slurry and she slumps once more.

"**Hopefully this lasts long enough that we'll have control of the base before she can become a problem...**" She looks over the woman once more, and then grabs another another vial of the drug and puts it and the injector in a pouch just in case. "**How are you with the door, NZ? We should be going**"
**"Task Complete, Master."**

The trio make their way back to Laboratory 3, passing Stormtroopers, Death Troopers, and more Stormcommandos. Thanks in large part to Veq's Empathic skills, Lexi is able to pass their trio off as belonging there, and none of the Troopers think twice to stop and question them.
This is all the more impressive, given how battle damaged all three of them are at this point.
Lexi is relieved as they continue to move about in the hallways relatively unmolested and pauses momentarily outside the door to tap on the door to give warning they are entering.
**"Commander, welcome back. Ghost has returned, given us more or less the same schematic you handed us, and disappeared again."**

Lexi starts the process of making use of the medical supplies to recover from the ordeal against the two Reapers and has Veq do the same. "**At least we know he's still around... I was getting worried. We were successful. We have the next level keycard, which will hopefully give us some security clearance.**" She looks over at NZ. "**Are you going to meet with Doctor Banos to get into the system?**"
**"With your permission, Master, I'd like Maker Banos to repair my damaged servos first..."**

"**Hopefully he's amicable to doing the repairs...**" she says with a nod, understanding why the droid would want to be repaired. "**Do you want to proceed with meeting with Banos while Veq and I take care of things here?**"
**"I can do so if you wish Master, but if I am stopped by a Stormtrooper I don't know if I can extricate myself from being captured."**
"**Are your stealth generators damaged?**"
**"Negative, Master. They are still operable, however, they do draw upon my power supply."**
Lexi nods. "**Very well then. Once I heal up then the two of us will go see Banos.**"
**"I am very much looking forward to this meeting, Master."**
**"If I had feelings, I would state that I were even excited for this meeting, but alas, I do not."**
**"I'm sorry to have failed you again, Master."**
